title: rumex hippolapathum var. domesticus
intro: Rumex hippolapathum var. domesticus, also known as dock or curly dock, is a perennial plant belonging to the buckwheat family Polygonaceae. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been reported to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rumex hippolapathum var. domesticus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin conditions.
